notes: Short scaffold file (206 lines, 8 decls) that constructs the V-side genuine isogeny betaDualV = r·V − s and reduces the Wall-A degree keystone to three named standing residuals (trace relation, double-Vieta pullback identity, IsDualOf β_dual β). The main theorem genuineIsogSmulSub_degree_eq_signed_closed has a 20-line signature but only an 8-line proof body delegating entirely to GapSpines.genuineIsogSmulSub_degree_eq_signed_of_full_pivot_chain. No sorries, no set_option, no long proofs; isogeny_isGenuineWith_pointMap is the one declaration consumed by other files (SeparableWitnesses, SeparableTransportBridge).
